Introduction

The study of quantum mechanics has led to remarkable insights. Einstein’s famous equation E = mc^2 changed physics forever.

Methods

We used the following approach:

  1. Collect data from multiple sources

  2. Apply the transformation T(x) = \frac{1}{1 + e^{-x}}

  3. Validate results

Data Collection

Dataset

Samples

Accuracy

Train

10000

0.95

Test

2000

0.93

Results

The results were significant:

Our findings demonstrate a clear improvement over the baseline methodology.

import numpy as np
results = np.mean(scores, axis=0)
print(f"Mean accuracy: {results:.4f}")
\chi^2 = \sum_{i=1}^{n} \frac{(O_i - E_i)^2}{E_i}

Conclusion

Further work is needed in:

  • Scaling the approach

  • Testing with larger diverse datasets

  • Improving the documentation
